dataList.name: Artwork: Pulsation
dataList.desc:
If an ally consumed 10+ [Charge] Count in a single turn with its Base Skills, the said ally deals +20% damage with Base Skills next turn (excluding 'Unique Charge' with fixed Potency)
- If the [Charge] consumed was 'Unique Charge', inflict +1 more [Laceration] and [Laceration] Count next turn

dataList.name: Artwork: Ferity
dataList.desc:
Deal +20% damage with Blunt Skills against enemies that either have 35+ [Sinking] Potency or are at 15 or lower SP ([Sinking] Potency is calculated per-Part)
- If the said Blunt Skill is either a Gloom Skill or a Skill that inflicts [Laceration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Bleed', and hit the target, gain 1 [Enhancement] next turn (once per turn per Identity)

dataList.name: Universal Skeleton
dataList.desc:
The Ring-faction Identities: At Attack End, inflict 1 Stack of a random Attack Type Resist Down on target (2 times per turn)

The Ring-faction Identities deal +10% damage

dataList.name: Artwork: Evolving Pulsation
dataList.desc:
Turn Start: Activates when there are 2 or more The Ring-faction Identities (only counts Identities on the field)

The Ring School of Corporism-faction Identities inflict 1 [SlashResistDown] On Hit with Base Skills (once per Skill; 2 times per turn)

The Ring Identities deal +20% damage

Turn Start: At 99+ total sum of [Laceration] Potency on all enemies, The Ring School of Corporism-faction Identities gain 1 [RingFingerPhysical]

dataList.name: Artwork: Taxidermied Ferity
dataList.desc:
Turn Start: Activates when there are 2 or more The Ring-faction Identities (only counts Identities on the field)

The Ring School of Fauvism-faction Identities inflict 1 [HitResistDown] On Hit with Base Skills (once per Skill; 2 times per turn)

The Ring Identities deal +20% damage

Turn Start: At 99+ total sum of [Laceration] Potency on all enemies, The Ring School of Fauvism-faction Identities gain 1 [RingFingerFauvism]

dataList.name: The Middle Styled Knuckle-dusters
dataList.desc: If the target has 1.5 or lower Blunt Resistance, Blunt Resistance +0.3

dataList.name: Unoccupied Birdcage
dataList.desc:
At Attack End of a Skill that has 2+ Atk Weight, gain +(# of hits on an enemy / 2) E.G.O resource of that Skill's Affinity (rounded down; max 5 per Skill)

On Crit with a Skill that has 2+ Atk Weight, gain +(# of Coins that hit Critically) E.G.O resource of the least-owned Affinity at Attack End (max 3)

dataList.name: Searing Brass
dataList.desc:
Max [Combustion] Potency +11

Triple the first [Combustion] Potency to be inflicted in the Encounter (once per Encounter)

When an enemy takes [Combustion] damage, deal Wrath damage equal to [Combustion] Potency

Skills that inflict [Combustion] Potency, [Combustion] Count, or 'Unique Burn' deal +20% damage

dataList.name: Searing Brass+
dataList.desc:
<style="upgradeHighlight">Max [Combustion] Potency +21</style>

Triple the first [Combustion] Potency to be inflicted in the Encounter (once per Encounter)

When an enemy takes [Combustion] damage, deal Wrath damage equal to [Combustion] Potency

Skills that inflict [Combustion] Potency, [Combustion] Count, or 'Unique Burn' deal <style="upgradeHighlight">+25%</style> damage

dataList.name: Searing Brass++
dataList.desc:
Max [Combustion] Potency +21

Triple the first [Combustion] Potency to be inflicted in the Encounter (once per Encounter)

When an enemy takes [Combustion] damage, deal Wrath damage equal to ([Combustion] Potency x <style="upgradeHighlight">1.5</style>)

Skills that inflict [Combustion] Potency, [Combustion] Count, or 'Unique Burn' deal <style="upgradeHighlight">+30%</style> damage

dataList.name: Universal Instinct
dataList.desc:
Turn End: Randomly apply 1 Stack of a random Affinity's <noparse>Damage Up</noparse> next turn to (# of enemies with [Laceration]) The Ring-faction Identities (once per Identity per turn; in Focused Encounters, Parts)

The Ring-faction Identities deal +10% damage
